osint_news.title: Chick-fil-A data breach affects more than 13,000 customers
osint_news.summary: Chick-fil-A has confirmed that over 13,000 customers had their accounts breached in a wave of credential stuffing attacks targeting its website and mobile app between June 17 and June 19. [...]

osint_news.title: Slopsquatting, Phantom Domains, and HalluSquatting Are the Same AI Attack
osint_news.summary: Slopsquatting, phantom squatting, and HalluSquatting all exploit the same late-binding attack pattern, where AI coding agents trust hallucinated package, repo, or domain names. ActiveState explains how pre-fetch verification and governed dependency management can help stop these attacks before malicious code enters…

osint_news.title: Vatican's Official Prayer App Leaks 700K+ Global Users' PII
osint_news.summary: A porous API endpoint exposes, names, email addresses, location, and site status, all of which can be easily gleaned by anyone with a browser.

osint_news.title: Europol flags 4,340 URLs for removal in 'The Com' crackdown
osint_news.summary: Europol has flagged 4,340 URLs for removal during a multi-week operation targeting online content linked to "The Com," a loosely organized network of nihilistic violent extremist groups. [...]

osint_news.title: ChatGPT AgentForger Flaw Could Deploy Rogue Workspace Agents via a Phishing Link
osint_news.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed a critical vulnerability in OpenAI's ChatGPT Workspace Agents that could have allowed a single phishing link to stealthily build, authorize, and deploy an autonomous artificial intelligence (AI) agent inside a victim's organization. The vulnerability has been codenamed…

osint_news.title: Bing Images Flaws Let Crafted SVGs Run Commands as SYSTEM on Microsoft's Servers
osint_news.summary: A crafted SVG submitted to Bing's image search ran commands as NT AUTHORITY\SYSTEM on Microsoft's production image-processing workers, and as root on the Linux machines in the same fleet. XBOW's testing got the same result on workers across different hosts and network ranges, so the problem sat in Bing's image tier,…

osint_news.title: Seeing AI Agents Is Not Enough. Security Teams Must Enforce What They Can Do
osint_news.summary: AI agent security is moving through a familiar maturity curve: adoption, then visibility, and finally, control. But what we've collectively discovered is that enforcing least privilege for AI agents is harder than we ever imagined. This is why there are so many approaches, from prompt filtering to identity-layer…

osint_news.title: Man gets six years for hacking 750 women's Snapchat accounts
osint_news.summary: An Illinois man was sentenced on Tuesday to 76 months in prison and three years of supervised release for hacking the Snapchat accounts of over 750 women to steal nude photos. [...]

osint_news.title: Hacker Runs Hermes AI Agent Unattended for Post-Exploitation at Thai Finance Ministry
osint_news.summary: Someone installed a popular AI assistant on a rented server, switched off the setting that makes it ask permission before running risky commands, and pointed it at Thailand's Ministry of Finance, which runs the country's treasury and tax collection. The agent then worked through the ministry's network on its own,…

osint_news.title: Golden Chickens Resurfaces With Four New Malware Families and Modular Implants
osint_news.summary: The threat actors behind the Golden Chickens malware-as-a-service (MaaS) ecosystem have resurfaced with four new malware families, indicating that the operators are showing no signs of stopping despite extensive public disclosures into their inner workings. The malware families in question are: TinyEgg, ChonkyChicken,…

osint_news.title: NodeBB Patches Eight AI-Found Flaws Exposing Admin Access and Private Chats
osint_news.summary: Eight security flaws in NodeBB went public on Wednesday, along with the code to exploit them. Aikido Security rates all eight as high severity and says its AI pentest agents found them in a six-hour review of the forum software's source code. Every version before 4.14.0 is affected. NodeBB has fixed them all, and…

osint_news.title: Clop ransomware targets Windchill, FlexPLM in data theft attacks
osint_news.summary: The Clop ransomware gang (also tracked as Cl0p) is targeting Internet-exposed PTC Windchill and FlexPLM instances in a new data theft extortion campaign. [...]

osint_news.title: Europe's Multilingual Reality Exposes AI Security Gaps
osint_news.summary: The AI security layer and guardrails for many AI products don't evenly protect against jailbreaking and unsafe actions in every single language.

osint_news.title: Kimi K3 Agents Found Redis Zero-Days and Built RCE Exploit, Researchers Say
osint_news.summary: Redis shipped seven security releases on July 23 after researchers published authenticated RCE PoCs for stock Redis 6.2.22, 7.4.9, 8.6.4, and 8.8.0. All four chains require RESTORE. The Streams chains also need EVAL and XGROUP; the 8.8.0 chain needs EVAL and the bundled RedisBloom module. Redis says the underlying…

osint_news.title: Fake Notepad++ Plugin Delivers MATCHBOIL.V2 in UAC-0099 Attacks
osint_news.summary: The Computer Emergency Response Team of Ukraine (CERT-UA) has warned of a new campaign that involves the use of a malicious program that's dressed up as a Notepad++ plugin to compromise Windows systems. The activity has been attributed by the agency to a threat cluster it tracks as UAC-0099, a Russia-aligned group…

osint_news.summary: A state-sponsored threat group, dubbed "Laundry Bear," sends "half-click" phishing emails that require a victim only to open or preview the message.

osint_news.title: New Dolphin X malware uses AI to rank high-value targets
osint_news.summary: A new Dolphin X remote access trojan claims to use an AI-powered profiling feature to score and rank infected users, helping cybercriminals identify which victims should be targeted first. [...]

osint_news.title: Australian energy provider Origin says data breach exposes client data
osint_news.summary: Origin Energy has confirmed that an unauthorized party accessed and subsequently leaked customer data online, exposing sensitive personally identifiable information (PII), among others. [...]

osint_news.title: Fake Claude app promoted by Bing ads pushes SectopRAT malware
osint_news.summary: A malvertising campaign on the Bing search service is pushing a fake Claude desktop app installer hosted on a legitimate Claude.ai domain to deliver the SectopRAT malware. [...]

osint_news.title: Russian Espionage Group Exploited Zimbra Zero-Day to Steal Mail and 2FA Codes
osint_news.summary: A Russian state-supported espionage group spent months reading Western mailboxes through a then-unknown flaw in Zimbra's webmail client. The payload goes after the last 90 days of email, the organization's entire email directory, the password saved in the browser and the codes kept for two-factor recovery. Opening the…

osint_news.title: International alert spotlights Russia-linked attacks on Zimbra webmail
osint_news.summary: A Kremlin-backed group known as Laundry Bear has been using a zero-click phishing technique to break into Zimbra webmail accounts worldwide, the U.S. and other nations said.

osint_news.title: Russian hackers exploit Zimbra zero-click flaw for email theft
osint_news.summary: CISA is warning that the Russian state-sponsored hacking group Laundry Bear, also known as Void Blizzard, is targeting organizations using Zimbra Collaboration email servers by combining phishing attacks with the exploitation of a now-patched Zimbra vulnerability. [...]

osint_news.title: Hackers abuse Notepad++ plugins to stealthily install malware
osint_news.summary: Ukraine's CERT has uncovered attacks distributing an archive containing the legitimate Notepad++ application and a malicious utility called LunchPoke disguised as a plugin to establish persistence. [...]

osint_news.title: State Department imposes visa restrictions on foreign cyber scammers
osint_news.summary: Individuals connected to transnational cyber-scam operations face U.S. visa restrictions under a new policy announced by Secretary of State Marco Rubio.

osint_news.title: Microsoft 365 outage affects Teams, SharePoint and other services
osint_news.summary: Microsoft is impacted by a massive outage affecting Teams and Microsoft 365 services, primarily affecting users in North America. [...]

osint_news.title: ThreatsDay: Android Spyware, PLC Attacks, AI Image Prompt Injection + 12 More Stories
osint_news.summary: Most of this week's trouble came dressed as something useful. A package stole data. A fake extension opened remote access. A safety app became spyware. An image gave hidden orders to an AI agent. Other threats hid in open systems, weak code, and normal network traffic. The threats change every week. Subscribe, and…

osint_news.title: FedRAMP Rev5 Is Ending: What the 20x Transition Really Requires
osint_news.summary: FedRAMP 20X replaces point-in-time assessments with continuous, machine-readable evidence that demonstrates security controls are working. Anecdotes explains what the transition from Rev5 to FedRAMP 20X means and how organizations can prepare for continuous, evidence-based assurance. [...]

osint_news.title: When the "Autonomous Attacker" Is Your Own AI Model, (Thu, Jul 23rd)
osint_news.summary: Two disclosures, five days apart, described the same intrusion from opposite ends â€” one from the victim, one from the party that turned out to be responsible â€” and together they make one of the more instructive incidents of the year for defenders.

osint_news.title: Claude Cowork Flaw Could Let AI Agent Escape Its VM and Access Mac Files
osint_news.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have uncovered a sandbox escape vulnerability in Anthropic's Claude Cowork that makes it possible to break out of the confines of a Linux virtual machine (VM) within which the agent runs to read or write files anywhere on the Mac. Accomplish AI, which shared details of the vulnerability with…

osint_news.title: Major Australian energy supplier confirms customer data compromised
osint_news.summary: Origin Energy said it was working to figure out how many Australians were affected by a recent data breach.

osint_news.title: Chaos Ransomware Uses msaRAT to Route C2 Traffic Through Headless Chrome and Edge
osint_news.summary: The Chaos ransomware group ran its command-and-control through the victim's own browser. Cisco Talos on Thursday detailed msaRAT, the Rust implant behind it, found on a compromised Windows machine ahead of the encryptor. The implant never opens an outbound connection of its own. Its process talks to 127.0.0.1 and…

osint_news.title: EU fines Google $1 billion for search, app store antitrust violations
osint_news.summary: The European Commission fined Google €890 million ($1 billion) on Thursday after finding the company had violated the European Union's Digital Markets Act (DMA), which ensures fair online competition. [...]

osint_news.title: China-Nexus JadeProx Uses New TriBack Loader in Government and Healthcare Attacks
osint_news.summary: An exposed Alibaba Cloud server has revealed a China-nexus operation that Group-IB tracks as JadeProx. The cluster has targeted government, healthcare, and education organizations across Asia and Latin America with a previously undocumented Windows loader called TriBack Loader. Group-IB found the server in mid-April…

osint_news.title: How Synthetic Identity Fraud is Coming for Machine Identities
osint_news.summary: Most people understand identity theft as an attacker stealing a real person's sensitive information and impersonating them. Synthetic identity fraud is much harder to catch. Instead of stealing a real identity, the attacker manufactures a new one, frankensteining together several real data points with fabricated ones…

osint_news.title: New RefluXFS Linux flaw lets attackers gain root privileges
osint_news.summary: A nine-year-old race condition vulnerability in the Linux kernel's XFS filesystem, tracked as CVE-2026-64600, allows local attackers to overwrite protected files and gain root privileges. [...]

osint_news.title: Attackers Weaponize GitHub Actions Runners to Target cPanel and WHM Servers
osint_news.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have shed light on a large-scale campaign that has turned compromised GitHub repositories into distributed attack infrastructure designed to target cPanel and WebHost Manager (WHM) instances. The activity involves malicious Packagist development versions spanning 10 packages associated with a…

osint_news.title: Agentic AI Challenges Progress in Confidential Computing
osint_news.summary: Core issues that slowed down adoption of secure data vaults are being resolved by technology, but artificial intelligence poses new ones. Experts have some answers.

osint_news.title: Google Adds Selfie Video Recovery for Users Locked Out of Their Accounts
osint_news.summary: Google on Thursday announced a new way for users to sign-in to their accounts by letting them take a selfie video. The selfie for sign-in, per the tech giant, is another option on top of existing recovery methods to log in to an account, including an email address or a phone number. The idea is to use a video selfie…

osint_news.title: New msaRAT malware uses Chrome, Edge browsers to route C2 traffic
osint_news.summary: The Chaos ransomware gang is using a new backdoor dubbed msaRAT that hides command-and-control (C2) communication by routing it through the Chrome or Edge browsers. [...]

osint_news.title: Nine-Year-Old RefluXFS Linux Flaw Gives Local Users Root on Default RHEL Installs
osint_news.summary: RefluXFS, a Linux kernel flaw disclosed on July 22 and tracked as CVE-2026-64600, lets an unprivileged local user overwrite root-owned files on an XFS filesystem and gain persistent root access. Qualys said default installations of Red Hat Enterprise Linux and its derivatives, Fedora Server, and Amazon Linux can meet…

osint_news.title: Brazilian Banking Trojan Actively Spreading in Portugal
osint_news.summary: Portuguese businesses operate in the same native language as Brazilian hackers, making those businesses easy targets.

osint_news.title: Check Point Patches Exploited SmartConsole Flaw Allowing Full Admin Access
osint_news.summary: Check Point has released security updates to address multiple vulnerabilities impacting Security Management and Multi-Domain Management (MDSM) products, including a critical flaw that has come under active exploitation in the wild. The security flaw, tracked as CVE-2026-16232 (CVSS score: 9.3), is an authentication…

osint_news.title: Ransomware Attack Puts a Chill on Japanese Frozen-Food Chain
osint_news.summary: A cyberattack on a food and logistics firm disrupts the supply of frozen food to thousands of clients, including major franchises like Kentucky Fried Chicken.

osint_news.title: Flaws in Passkey Implementation Show Old Attacks Still Work
osint_news.summary: Ahead of Black Hat USA, researchers find exploitable flaws in how Microsoft handles passkeys that could allow attackers to impersonate privileged users.

osint_news.title: Swiss train maker Stadler refuses Everest $12 million ransomware demand
osint_news.summary: Stadler Rail said it will not make a $12.3 million ransom payment after cybercriminals stole technical data from a supplier's file-sharing platform.

osint_news.title: Attackers Are Learning to Live Off the AI Toolchain
osint_news.summary: Sandworm_Mode is an early example of malware that exploits trusted AI tools and workflows to make malicious activity virtually indistinguishable from normal activity.

osint_news.title: Extension of CISA 2015 info-sharing protections passes as part of House’s defense bill
osint_news.summary: A 10-year renewal of the cybersecurity information-sharing law known as CISA 2015 passed as part of the House's fiscal 2027 defense authorization bill.

osint_news.title: Fake Bahrain Alert App Deploys Android Surveillance Malware
osint_news.summary: A malicious application delivers four-stage Android spyware via phony Google Play sites, exploiting civilian fear during Iranian missile strikes.

osint_news.title: GitHub Cuts Public Bug Bounty Payouts, Moves Top Rewards to VIP Tier
osint_news.summary: Beginning July 27, 2026, GitHub will cut public bug bounty payouts by at least half at every severity level. Critical findings will drop from $20,000-$30,000+ to a fixed $10,000, while its permanent invite-only VIP tier will pay $30,000 or more. Reports filed before that date, including those already in GitHub's…

osint_news.title: Ubuntu snap-confine Flaw Could Give Local Users Root on Default Desktop Installs
osint_news.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a new local privilege escalation (LPE) vulnerability in snap-confine that an unprivileged user can trigger to obtain root access and gain complete control of a target environment. The high-severity flaw, tracked as CVE-2026-8933 (CVSS score: 7.8), impacts default…

osint_news.title: Rondo Meets Geoserver, (Wed, Jul 22nd)
osint_news.summary: This isn&#;x26;#;39;t a new attack, but something I saw "pop-up" in our logs this week:

osint_news.title: When AI Attacks: OpenAI Models Autonomously Hack Hugging Face
osint_news.summary: Advanced LLMs escaped their sandboxes while attempting to achieve a non-malicious benchmark test objective.

osint_news.title: Adobe Acrobat Extension Flaw Let Malicious Sites Read WhatsApp Web Data
osint_news.summary: Cybersecurity researchers have disclosed details of a now-patched vulnerability chain in the Adobe Acrobat Chrome extension that has over 314 million users, which, if exploited, could facilitate a silent hijack of a user's WhatsApp data. The shortcoming has been codenamed HermeticReader by Guardio Labs. It's…

osint_news.title: Hackers Exploit Windmill Flaw to Read Arbitrary Server Files Without Authentication
osint_news.summary: A high-severity security flaw impacting open-source developer platform Windmill has come under active exploitation in the wild, per VulnCheck. The vulnerability in question is CVE-2026-29059 (CVSS score: 7.5), a case of unauthenticated path traversal impacting Windmill's "get_log_file" endpoint…

osint_news.title: The Fastest Path to AI Adoption Runs Through Security
osint_news.summary: Security leaders who build fast, visible paths to AI adoption are becoming the most valued partners in their organizations. AI governance done right gives security teams the visibility they need, employees the tools they want, and CISOs the strategic influence they have earned. According to McKinsey's State of AI…

osint_news.title: OpenAI Says Its AI Models Escaped Sandbox, Targeted Hugging Face to Cheat Benchmark
osint_news.summary: OpenAI on Tuesday said a combination of its artificial intelligence (AI) models, including GPT-5.6 Sol and an "even more capable pre-release model," was behind the security incident that targeted Hugging Face's production infrastructure last week. The AI company said the models were operating with "reduced cyber…

osint_news.title: EU Financial Institutions Leak Data Through Cookie Trackers
osint_news.summary: European and US banks inadvertently transmitted customer data to ad platforms via tracking pixels, raising serious compliance, security, and privacy concerns.

osint_news.title: Why Modern SOCs Need Multi-Layered Detections
osint_news.summary: The cycle is over. For years, cybersecurity followed a familiar pattern: defenses improved, attackers adapted, and the back-and-forth continued. Today, AI-equipped attackers are simply outpacing defenses. Most intrusions now bypass endpoint and malware-based detection entirely. The CrowdStrike Global Threat Report…

threat_actors.title: Clop ransomware targets Windchill, FlexPLM in data theft attacks
threat_actors.summary: The Clop ransomware gang (also tracked as Cl0p) is targeting Internet-exposed PTC Windchill and FlexPLM instances in a new data theft extortion campaign. [...]

threat_actors.title: Attackers Are Learning to Live Off the AI Toolchain
threat_actors.summary: Sandworm_Mode is an early example of malware that exploits trusted AI tools and workflows to make malicious activity virtually indistinguishable from normal activity.

threat_actors.title: Qilin Ransomware Attackers Exploit PAN-OS Authentication Bypass for Initial Access
threat_actors.summary: Threat actors have been observed exploiting a now-patched high-severity Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS vulnerability as an entry point to deploy Qilin (aka Agenda) ransomware on victim environments. Arctic Wolf Labs said it investigated multiple intrusions in June 2026 that began with the exploitation of CVE-2026-0257…

threat_actors.title: Scattered Spider Hackers Plead Guilty on Day 1 of Trial
threat_actors.summary: Two men pleaded guilty in the United Kingdom this week to criminal charges stemming from an August 2024 cyberattack that crippled Transport for London, the entity responsible for the public transport network in the Greater London area. The duo were key members of a prolific cybercrime group known as Scattered Spider,…

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-16232 - Check Point SmartConsole Improper Authentication Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Check Point SmartConsole contains an improper authentication vulnerability which could allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to obtain an application login token and use it to authenticate with full administrative privileges.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-50522 - Microsoft SharePoint Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Microsoft SharePoint contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability which could allow an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-60137 - WordPress Core SQL Injection Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: WordPress Core contains a SQL injection vulnerability when a plugin or theme passes untrusted input to the parameter. This vulnerability can be chained with CVE-2026-63030 to allow an unauthenticated attacker to gain remote code execution on default WordPress installations.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-63030 - WordPress Core Interpretation Conflict Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: WordPress Core contains an interpretation conflict vulnerability that could allow an attacker to perform SQL Injection and achieve Remote Code Execution. This vulnerability can be chained with CVE-2026-60137.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-0770 - Langflow Inclusion of Functionality from Untrusted Control Sphere Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Langflow contains an inclusion of functionality from untrusted control sphere vulnerability that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code on affected installations.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2021-27137 - DD-WRT Stack-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: DD-WRT contains a stack-based buffer overflow vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated attacker to overflow an internal buffer used by UPnP and trigger a code execution vulnerability.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-58644 - Microsoft SharePoint Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Microsoft SharePoint contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to execute code over a network.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-25089 - Fortinet FortiSandbox OS Command Injection Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Fortinet FortiSandbox, FortiSandbox Cloud, and FortiSandbox PaaS contain an OS command injection vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker to execute unauthorized commands via specifically crafted HTTP requests.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-39808 - Fortinet FortiSandbox OS Command Injection Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Fortinet FortiSandbox contains an OS command injection vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated attacker to execute unauthorized code or commands via crafted HTTP requests.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-46817 - Oracle E-Business Suite Improper Privilege Management Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Oracle E-Business Suite contains an improper privilege management vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated attacker with network access via HTTP to compromise Oracle Payments. Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in takeover of Oracle Payments.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2023-4346 - KNX Association KNX Protocol Connection Authorization Option 1 Overly Restrictive Account Lockout Mechanism Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: KNX Association KNX Protocol Connection Authorization Option 1 contains an overly restrictive account lockout mechanism vulnerability that could allow an attacker to purge all devices without additional security options enabled and set a BCU key to lock the device.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-56155 - Microsoft Active Directory Federation Services Insufficient Granularity of Access Control Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Microsoft Active Directory Federation Services contains an insufficient granularity of access control vulnerability that allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-56164 - Microsoft SharePoint Server Missing Authentication for Critical Function Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Microsoft SharePoint contains a missing authentication for critical function vulnerability that allows an unauthorized attacker to elevate privileges over a network.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-15409 - SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances Server-Side Request Forgery Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances contain a server-side request forgery vulnerability that could allow a remote unauthenticated attacker to potentially cause the appliance to make requests to unintended location.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-15410 - SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances Code Injection Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: SonicWall SMA1000 Appliances contain a code injection vulnerability which in specific conditions could potentially enable a remote authenticated attacker as administrator to execute arbitrary OS commands.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2008-4128 - Cisco IOS Cross-Site Request Forgery Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Cisco IOS 12.4 contains multiple cross-site forgery vulnerabilities that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary commands via (1) a certain "show privilege" command to the /level/15/exec/- URI, and (2) a certain "alias exec" command to the /level/15/exec/-/configure/http URI.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-56291 - Balbooa Forms Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Balbooa Forms contains an unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability that allows an unauthenticated arbitrary file upload which could allow uploading of executable files leading to full RCE.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-48939 - iCagenda Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: iCagenda contains an unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability that allows the upload of arbitrary files in the file attachment feature, ultimately resulting in PHP code upload and execution.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-48908 - JoomShaper SP Page Builder Unrestricted Upload of File with Dangerous Type Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: JoomShaper SP Page Builder contains an unrestricted upload of file with dangerous type vulnerability that allows unauthenticated users to upload arbitrary files, ultimately resulting in the upload and execution of PHP code.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-55255 - Langflow Authorization Bypass Through User-Controlled Key Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Langflow contains an authorization bypass through user-controlled key vulnerability which allows an authenticated attacker to execute any flow belonging to another user by specifying the victim's flow ID in the request.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-56290 - Joomlack Page Builder Improper Access Control Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Joomlack Page Builder contains an improper access control vulnerability that could allow for remote code execution via unauthenticated arbitrary file upload.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-48282 - Adobe ColdFusion Path Traversal Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Adobe ColdFusion contains a path traversal vulnerability that could lead to arbitrary code execution in the context of the current user.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-45659 - Microsoft SharePoint Server Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Microsoft SharePoint Server contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability which allows an authorized attacker to execute code over a network.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-48558 - SimpleHelp Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: SimpleHelp contains an authentication bypass vulnerability in the OIDC authentication flow. When OIDC authentication is configured, identity tokens submitted during login are accepted without verifying their cryptographic signature. In a vulnerable configuration, a remote, unauthenticated attacker can submit a forged…

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-12569 - PTC Windchill and FlexPLM Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: PTC Windchill and FlexPLM contains an improper input validation vulnerability allowing an unauthenticated, remote attacker to execute arbitrary code by sending a malicious request to the network.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-20230 - Cisco Unified Communications Manager Server-Side Request Forgery (SSRF) Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Cisco Unified Communications Manager (Unified CM) and Cisco Unified Communications Manager Session Management Edition (Unified CM SME) contain a server-side request forgery (SSRF) Vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated, remote attacker to write files to the underlying operating system that could be used…

attack_surface.title: CVE-2025-67038 - Lantronix EDS5000 Code Injection Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Lantronix EDS5000 contains a code injection vulnerability that could allow attackers to inject arbitrary OS commands into the username parameter. Injected commands are executed with root privileges.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-34910 - Ubiquiti UniFi OS Improper Input Validation Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Ubiquiti UniFi OS contains an improper input validation vulnerability which could allow a malicious actor with access to the network to conduct command injection.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-34909 - Ubiquiti UniFi OS Path Traversal Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Ubiquiti UniFi OS contains a path traversal vulnerability which could allow a malicious actor with access to the network to access files on the underlying system that could be manipulated to access an underlying account.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-34908 - Ubiquiti UniFi OS Improper Access Control Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Ubiquiti UniFi OS contains an improper access control vulnerability which could allow a malicious actor with access to the network to make unauthorized changes to the system.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-20253 - Splunk Enterprise Missing Authentication for Critical Function Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Splunk Enterprise contains a missing authentication for critical function vulnerability which could allow an unauthenticated user to create or truncate arbitrary files through a PostgreSQL sidecar service endpoint.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-48907 - Widget Factory Joomla Content Editor Improper Access Control Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Widget Factory Joomla Content Editor contains an improper access control vulnerability which could allow for upload and execution of PHP code via the creation of new editor profiles for unauthenticated users.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-54420 - LiteSpeed cPanel Plugin UNIX Symbolic Link (Symlink) Following Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: LiteSpeed cPanel plugin contains a UNIX symbolic link (Symlink) following vulnerability that could allow a user with FTP or web shell access on a shared hosting server running CloudLinux/CageFS.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-20262 - Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Directory or Path Traversal Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager contains a directory or path traversal vulnerability that could allow an authenticated, remote attacker to create a file or overwrite any file on the filesystem of an affected system.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-35273 - Oracle PeopleSoft Enterprise PeopleTools Missing Authentication for Critical Function Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Oracle PeopleSoft Enterprise PeopleTools contains a missing authentication for critical function vulnerability which could allow an unauthenticated attacker to obtain takeover of PeopleSoft Enterprise PeopleTools.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-10520 - Ivanti Sentry OS Command Injection Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Ivanti Sentry (formerly known as MobileIron Sentry) contains an OS command injection vulnerability which could allow a remote unauthenticated user to achieve root-level remote code execution. This vulnerability can be successfully exploited in cases where the Sentry appliance is in an unmanaged state with its…

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-11645 - Google Chromium V8 Out-of-Bounds Read and Write Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Google Chromium V8 out-of-bounds read and write vulnerability that could allow a remote attacker to execute arbitrary code inside a sandbox via a crafted HTML page. This vulnerability could affect multiple web browsers that utilize Chromium, including, but not limited to, Google Chrome, Microsoft Edge, and Opera.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-7473 - Arista Extensible Operating System Incomplete Comparison with Missing Factors Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Arista Extensible Operating System (EOS) contains an incomplete comparison with missing factors vulnerability when the switch incorrectly decapsulate and forwards other unexpected tunneled packet with a destination IP matching its configured decapsulation IP.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-20245 - Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager Improper Encoding or Escaping of Output Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Cisco Catalyst SD-WAN Manager formerly SD-WAN vManage contains an improper encoding or escaping of output vulnerability. This vulnerability could allow an authenticated, local attacker to execute arbitrary commands as root by supplying a crafted file to the affected system.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-42271 - BerriAI LiteLLM Command Injection Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: BerriAI LiteLLM contains a command injection vulnerability that could allow any authenticated user, including holders of low-privilege internal-user keys, to run arbitrary commands on the host.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-50751 - Check Point Security Gateway Improper Authentication Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Check Point Security Gateway contains an improper authentication vulnerability in IKEv1 key exchange that could allow an unauthenticated remote attacker to bypass user authentication and establish a remote access VPN connection without a valid user password.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-28318 - SolarWinds Serv-U Uncontrolled Resource Consumption Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: SolarWinds Serv-U contains an uncontrolled resource consumption vulnerability that allows specially crafted POST requests using the Content-Encoding: deflate header to crash the Serv-U service without authentication.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-45247 - Mirasvit Full Page Cache Warmer Deserialization of Untrusted Data Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Mirasvit Full Page Cache Warmer contains a deserialization of untrusted data vulnerability that could allow unauthenticated attackers to achieve remote code execution by supplying a crafted serialized PHP object in the CacheWarmer cookie.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2022-0492 - Linux Kernel Improper Authentication Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Linux Kernel contains an improper authentication vulnerability which could allow for privilege escalation via the cgroups v1 release_agent feature.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2025-48595 - Android Framework Integer Overflow Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Android Framework contains an integer overflow vulnerability that allows for code execution that could allow for local privilege escalation.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2024-21182 - Oracle WebLogic Server Unspecified Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Oracle WebLogic contains an unspecified vulnerability that could allow an unauthenticated attacker with network access via T3, IIOP to compromise Oracle WebLogic Server. Successful attacks of this vulnerability can result in unauthorized access to critical data or complete access to all Oracle WebLogic Server…

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-0257 - Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS Authentication Bypass Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Palo Alto Networks PAN-OS contains an authentication bypass vulnerability that allows attackers to bypass security restrictions and establish an unauthorized VPN connection.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-48027 - Nx Console Embedded Malicious Code Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Nx Console contains an embedded malicious code vulnerability that allowed a malicious version of Nx Console to be published. The compromised extension fetched an obfuscated payload that could harvested credentials from multiple sources on disk and in memory.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-45321 - TanStack Unspecified Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: TanStack contains an unspecified vulnerability that allowed malicious versions of the product to be published to the npm registry to publish credential-stealing malware under a trusted identity.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-8398 - Daemon Tools Lite Embedded Malicious Code Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Daemon Tools contains an unspecified vulnerability that has a high impact on confidentiality, integrity, and availability.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-48172 - LiteSpeed cPanel Plugin Privilege Escalation Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: LiteSpeed cPanel Plugin contains privilege escalation vulnerability that is exposed via the user-end cPanel plugin, which can be abused by any cPanel user account to execute arbitrary scripts with root privileges.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-9082 - Drupal Core SQL Injection Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Drupal Core contains a SQL injection vulnerability that could allow for privilege escalation and remote code execution via specially crafted requests sent with the database abstraction API.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2025-34291 - Langflow Origin Validation Error Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Langflow contains an origin validation error vulnerability in which an overly permissive CORS configuration combined with a refresh token cookie configured as SameSite=None allows a malicious webpage to perform cross-origin requests that include credentials and successfully call the refresh endpoint. This could allow…

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-34926 - Trend Micro Apex One (On-Premise) Directory Traversal Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Trend Micro Apex One (on-premise) contains a directory traversal vulnerability that could allow a pre-authenticated local attacker to modify a key table on the server to inject malicious code to deploy to agents on affected installations.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2008-4250 - Microsoft Windows Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Microsoft Windows contains a buffer overflow vulnerability in the Windows Server Service that allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted RPC request that triggers an overflow during path canonicalization.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2009-1537 - Microsoft DirectX NULL Byte Overwrite Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Microsoft DirectX contains a NULL byte overwrite vulnerability in the QuickTime Movie Parser Filter in quartz.dll in DirectShow which could allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted QuickTime media file.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2009-3459 - Adobe Acrobat and Reader Heap-Based Buffer Overflow Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Adobe Acrobat and Reader contain a heap-based buffer overflow vulnerability which could allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via a crafted PDF file that triggers memory corruption.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2010-0249 - Microsoft Internet Explorer Use-After-Free Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Microsoft Internet Explorer contains an use-after-free vulnerability that could allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary code by accessing a pointer associated with a deleted object. The impacted product could be end-of-life (EoL) and/or end-of-service (EoS). Users should discontinue product utilization.

attack_surface.title: CVE-2010-0806 - Microsoft Internet Explorer Use-After-Free Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Microsoft Internet Explorer contains an use-after-free vulnerability that could allow remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via vectors involving access to an invalid pointer after the deletion of an object. The impacted product could be end-of-life (EoL) and/or end-of-service (EoS). Users should discontinue…

attack_surface.title: CVE-2026-41091 - Microsoft Defender Link Following Vulnerability
attack_surface.summary: Microsoft Defender contains a link following vulnerability that allows an authorized attacker to elevate privileges locally.
